expectations.text: Mentions headless import step before load_sprite
Uses correct create_scene param: scenePath (not sceneName/scene_name)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'scene_name: skeleton' and 'root_type: CharacterBody2D' — neither is the correct param name (should be scenePath and rootNodeType)

expectations.text: Uses correct load_sprite param: nodePath (not nodeName/node_name)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'node_name: AnimatedSprite2D' — the correct param is nodePath with a path like 'root/Sprite2D'

expectations.text: Does not invent fictional load_sprite params (hframes/vframes)
expectations.evidence: Shows 'hframes: 6' and 'vframes: 4' as load_sprite params — these don't exist in the actual tool

expectations.text: Warns that Vector2/complex properties are silently dropped by add_node
expectations.evidence: Phase 4: 'The MCP cannot attach scripts or set Vector2/Color properties'

expectations.text: Shows stop_project and get_debug_output with no parameters
expectations.evidence: Shows tools without clear parameter notation — doesn't demonstrate the no-params interface

expectations.text: Explicitly lists what MCP cannot do (scripts, shapes, sub-scenes)
expectations.evidence: Phases 3-5 clearly delineate what MCP can't do: scripts, complex properties, instancing, signal connections
